name: Flow E - Re-Engagement (Field Change Detection)
description: Daily trigger 7 AM ET (after Flow A). Detect field changes on existing prospects (physical_address, website, officer_name, num_sites). Generate fresh icebreaker via Claude. Set re_engagement_candidate=true, pipeline_status='pending_review', audit log event='re_engaged'

parameters.name: body
parameters.value:
{
  "legal_name": "{{ $node['Filter - Has Field Changes'].json.legal_name }}",
  "email": "{{ $node['Filter - Has Field Changes'].json.email }}",
  "physical_address": "{{ $node['Filter - Has Field Changes'].json.current_fields.physical_address }}",
  "website": "{{ $node['Filter - Has Field Changes'].json.current_fields.website }}",
  "officer_name": "{{ $node['Filter - Has Field Changes'].json.current_fields.officer_name }}",
  "num_sites": {{ $node['Filter - Has Field Changes'].json.current_fields.num_sites }},
  "detected_changes": {{ JSON.stringify($node['Filter - Has Field Changes'].json.detected_changes) }},
  "context": "re_engagement"
}

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value:
{
  "icebreaker": "{{ $node['Extract New Icebreaker'].json.new_icebreaker }}",
  "re_engagement_candidate": true,
  "pipeline_status": "pending_review",
  "last_field_snapshot": "{{ JSON.stringify($node['Filter - Has Field Changes'].json.current_fields) }}",
  "last_reengagement_date": "{{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}",
  "intent_signal": "{{ $node['Extract New Icebreaker'].json.intent_signal }}"
}

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value:
{
  "event_type": "re_engaged",
  "legal_name": "{{ $node['Extract New Icebreaker'].json.legal_name }}",
  "email": "{{ $node['Extract New Icebreaker'].json.email }}",
  "source": "Flow E - Field Change Detection",
  "details": "Field change detected: {{ $node['Extract New Icebreaker'].json.reason_for_reengagement }}. New icebreaker: {{ $node['Extract New Icebreaker'].json.new_icebreaker }}",
  "timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}
